name: NeuroSpect
description: AI trading intelligence platform for ICT/Smart Money traders. Data-foundation-first architecture: verified trading data, risk protection, ICT event detection, backtesting, AI coaching, forensics, scoring, rewards, advanced ML.

phases.name: Marketing + Demo
phases.description: Validate market interest through interactive marketing site, live simulator, ICT course, and EdgeLab demo. Technical validation: CI/CD, Sentry, data model audit.

phases.name: Trading Data Foundation
phases.description: Normalized, verified trading data layer. BrokerAccount model, trade extensions, instrument metadata, CSV import, Tradovate sync, data quality checks.

phases.name: Trader Workspace
phases.description: Daily-use trader workspace: full journal, analytics dashboard, behavior metrics (tilt, discipline, consistency). Free tier engagement layer.

phases.name: Prop Shield
phases.description: Prop firm rule tracking, trailing drawdown monitoring, tilt lockouts, advisory alerts, Stripe billing. FIRST REVENUE: Mentor $29/mo, Trader $99/mo.

phases.name: ICT Event Intelligence
phases.description: Programmable ICT event detection: FVGs, sweeps, order blocks, market structure, sessions as queryable events. Foundation for backtesting and forensics.

phases.name: EdgeLab Core
phases.description: Event-driven backtesting engine (5A), strategy compiler + Monte Carlo + walk-forward (5B), dashboard + null test (5C). Research tier $199/mo.

phases.name: AI Trade Review + RAG
phases.description: NeuroCore hybrid retrieval (BM25 + semantic + entity) and Mentor upgrade to multi-turn chat with citations, structured trade reviews, and context injection.

phases.name: Edge Forensics
phases.description: Loss pattern mining, mistake taxonomy, hypothesis generation. Turns repeated losses into testable EdgeLab experiments.

phases.name: NeuroScore + Leaderboard
phases.description: Risk-adjusted trader ranking (performance, drawdown, rules, consistency, tilt). Broker-verified trades only. Quant tier $349/mo.

phases.name: NeuroFund Elite Rewards
phases.description: Company-sponsored rewards and eligibility program. NOT pooled capital. Compliance-critical: approved language, admin review, 50-member activation threshold.

phases.name: Allocation Watchlist
phases.description: Internal workflow for identifying traders for challenge sponsorships, grants, or company-sponsored allocation consideration. Trader model cards, admin review.

phases.name: Advanced ML Research
phases.description: NSLM evaluation framework (11A), hybrid models + regime detection (11B), NeuroQuant + NeuroTrader shadow mode (11C). Gated by Phase 5C null test.

phases.name: NeuroGraph
phases.description: Persistent trading intelligence graph. Nodes = trades, events, features, setups, patterns, concepts. Plan-mode-first: data source mapping, schema design, seed strategy.
